commands.description: Print workspace, current user, and running timer.
Check local CLI configuration without contacting Clockify.
Start a timer. Resolves project, task, and tag names to IDs.
Stop the running timer for the current user.

commands.command: clk115 log <duration> <description> [-p project] [-t task] [--tag tag…] [--billable] [--end iso]
commands.description: Log a finished entry. Resolves project, task, and tag names to IDs. Duration accepts `1h30m`, `90m`, or `PT1H30M`.

commands.command: clk115 entries list [--limit N] [--page N] [--from YYYY-MM-DD] [--to YYYY-MM-DD] [--description text]
commands.description: List time entries for the current user.

commands.command: clk115 projects list [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text] [--archived] [--client id]
clk115 projects update <id> [--name text] [--client id] [--color hex] [--note text] [--billable|--no-billable] [--archived|--no-archived]

commands.description: Delete a project (archives first; an active project cannot be deleted).

commands.command: clk115 clients list [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text] [--archived]
clk115 clients update <id> [--name text] [--note text] [--address text] [--archived|--no-archived]

commands.description: Delete a client (archives first; an active client cannot be deleted).

commands.command: clk115 tasks list <projectId> [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text]

commands.description: Create a task under a project.
Get one task by project ID and task ID.

commands.command: clk115 tasks update <projectId> <id> [--name text] [--status ACTIVE|DONE] [--estimate iso] [--billable|--no-billable] [--assignee id…]

commands.description: Delete a task (marks DONE first; an active task cannot be deleted).

commands.command: clk115 tags list [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text] [--archived]
clk115 webhooks create --name X --url U --event E [--trigger-source-type T --trigger-source ids]
clk115 invoices create --client id --number N --currency USD --issued YYYY-MM-DD --due YYYY-MM-DD [--time-view-mode mode]
clk115 expenses list [--limit N] [--page N] [--start YYYY-MM-DD] [--end YYYY-MM-DD]
clk115 expenses update <id> --amount N --category id --date YYYY-MM-DD --user id [--project id] [--task id] [--notes text] [--billable|--no-billable]
commands.description: Update an expense (full replace of amount, category, date).

commands.command: clk115 timeoff list [--page N] [--limit N] [--start date] [--end date] [--status APPROVED,PENDING,…] [--user ids]
clk115 timeoff submit --policy id --start date (--end date | --days N) [--note text] [--half-day --half-day-period FIRST_HALF|SECOND_HALF]
commands.description: Submit a time-off request against a policy. Provide --end (HOURS-unit policies) or --days (DAYS-unit policies).

commands.command: clk115 scheduling list [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text]
clk115 scheduling create --user id --project id --start date --end date --hours-per-day N [--task id --note text --billable --include-non-working-days --publish]
commands.description: Create a scheduling assignment. Drafts by default; pass `--publish` to publish.

commands.command: clk115 audit-log search --start RFC3339 --end RFC3339 --actions A,B,… [--authors ids --authors-mode CONTAINS|DOES_NOT_CONTAIN --page N --limit N]
commands.description: Search the workspace audit log. Window must be ≤ 31 days.

commands.command: clk115 reports summary [--period p] [--from date] [--to date] [--groups PROJECT,TASK] [--billable] [--project name|id…] [--client name|id…]
commands.description: Summary report totals over a date range, grouped per --groups. Read-only.

commands.command: clk115 reports detailed [--period p] [--from date] [--to date] [--page N] [--page-size N]
commands.description: Detailed report listing individual time entries over a date range. Read-only.

commands.command: clk115 reports weekly [--period p] [--from date] [--to date] [--group USER|PROJECT] [--subgroup TIME]
commands.description: Weekly report aggregating tracked time per week over a date range. Read-only.

commands.command: clk115 reports attendance [--period p] [--from date] [--to date]
commands.description: Attendance report of clock-in/out activity over a date range. Read-only.
List the workspace's shared (public-link) reports. Read-only.
View a shared report's rendered data by ID (not workspace-scoped). Read-only.

commands.command: clk115 shared-reports create --name X --type T --filter json [--public]
clk115 shared-reports update <id> --name X --type T --filter json [--public]
commands.description: Replace a shared report by ID (full replace of name, type, and filter).
Show the current authenticated user (the API-key owner). Read-only.

commands.command: clk115 users list [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text]
commands.description: List members of the workspace. Read-only.
Invite (add) a user to the workspace by email.

commands.command: clk115 users update-profile <userId> [--name text] [--image-url url] [--remove-image] [--week-start day] [--work-capacity iso] [--working-days days…]
clk115 api <method> <path> [-q key=value…] [-H key=value…] [--body json|@file|-] [--all] [--page-size N] [--max-pages N] [--include-headers]
commands.description: Call a Clockify API path directly through the SDK client. Fills {workspaceId} from --workspace or CLOCKIFY_WORKSPACE_ID.
Print a shell completion script for zsh, bash, or fish.
